title: papaver somniferum subsp. setigerum
intro: Papaver somniferum subsp. setigerum, commonly known as the Himalayan poppy, is a subspecies of the opium poppy plant native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. This plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects due to the presence of alkaloids such as thebaine and oripavine. The health benefits of Papaver somniferum subsp. setigerum include relief from pain, inflammation, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential in treating anxiety and insomnia. The herbal preparations of this plant include dried latex, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications, but it's essential to note that proper dosing and usage should be guided by a healthcare professional.
